detail.description:
Driven by jealousy, a giant eraser steals the precious amulet that has brought color and joy to Chalk Village for generations. A group of brave chalks decides to reclaim it, but as they make their way back, the eraser spots them and launches a relentless pursuit. Will these chalks escape the eraser’s grasp and restore the amulet to its rightful place?

Get ready for an adrenaline-packed 2D sidescroller like no other! In Pastale, you and your friends (2-5 players) will face the challenge of outru
detail.recentChanges: Thank you for playing Pastale! In this version, we’ve added support for Simplified Chinese and Italian, along with minor bug fixes and improvements.
